cover_letter_preview:
Dear Hiring Team,

The iCIMS ATS Administrator role at Enterprise Solution caught my attention because the core of the work, configuring a system to match real workflows, supporting the people who use it daily, and keeping data clean enough to trust, maps directly to what I did as Technical Operations Manager at BEAT THE BOMB. There, I owned system configuration, authored SOPs that let junior staff resolve issues without escalation, and coordinated across departments to keep processes consistent and data accurate.

At BEAT THE BOMB I administered a multi-system technical environment, Linux servers, NUC kiosks, networked RFID, CCTV, and AV infrastructure, across hardware, OS, and network layers while keeping 20-30 staff per shift informed and moving. When recurring issues surfaced, I wrote runbooks and SOPs that codified the fix path so the same problem didn't require escalation twice. That same discipline, document it, train to it, measure whether it holds, is exactly what this role asks for in driving consistency across recruiting workflows and coaching hiring managers on process.

On the reporting and data-integrity side, I tracked operational KPIs, generated reports from the hel…
